description:
JSON output for `rocky state clear-schema-cache`.

`dry_run = true` reports what *would* be deleted without touching redb; `dry_run = false` deletes the entries. `entries_deleted` is the actual removed count (or would-be-removed count in dry-run).

dry_run.description: `true` when `--dry-run` was set; the cache is left untouched.

entries_deleted.description: Number of entries removed (or that would be removed in dry-run mode). Zero when the cache was already empty.

title: ClearSchemaCacheOutput
